features: Access to GPT-4o mini and limited GPT-4o
Web, desktop, and mobile app access

tiers.name: Plus

name: Claude

academic_warning: Excellent for analysis and writing assistance, but generated prose will trigger Turnitin. Always rewrite in your own voice.

academic_warning: Safe for grammar, style, and spelling corrections. Does not generate original content unless using the generative assistant feature, which should be avoided for graded essays.
